label: Top navigation bar
action: Fixed header: brand, section anchors (Definition through References), and locale selector.

label: Definition
action: Click to scroll smoothly to the “Definition” section (#hero).

label: Compare
action: Click to scroll smoothly to the “Compare” section (#compare).

label: Lab
action: Click to scroll smoothly to the “Lab” section (#playground).

label: AI Tutor
action: Click to scroll smoothly to the “AI Tutor” section (#ai-tutor).

label: Pitfalls
action: Click to scroll smoothly to the “Pitfalls” section (#pitfalls).

label: References
action: Click to scroll smoothly to the “References” section (#references).

label: Locale selector
action: Choose English, Simplified Chinese, or Traditional Chinese; UI strings update immediately.

label: English
action: Set #locale-select to “English”; persisted in localStorage key nepv-lens-locale.

label: Simplified Chinese (zh-CN)
action: Set #locale-select to zh-CN; persisted in localStorage key nepv-lens-locale.

label: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
action: Set #locale-select to zh-TW; persisted in localStorage key nepv-lens-locale.

label: Definition & Compare (side-by-side)
action: Read-only: NEPv definition (left) and linear EVP vs NEPv comparison (right), separated by a vertical divider.

label: Definition (Hero)
action: Read-only: problem statement, formula, and teaching notes.

label: Linear EVP vs NEPv
action: Read-only: two concept panels and footnote; no interactive controls.

label: Interactive lab (overview)
action: Two-column shell: compass, heatmap/spectrum, polar plot, iteration lab (left); setup drawer with model, sliders, freeze pitfall (right). AI Tutor sits below the shell.

label: Lab workspace (compass + observe + controls)
action: Main teaching surface: vector compass, residual banner, observe zone, polar plot, iteration controls, and collapsible setup drawer.

label: Relative residual formula banner
action: Read-only: TeX and plain-text definition of r_rel(x, λ).

label: Model & controls drawer
action: Expand/collapse the right-hand setup drawer (model, parameters, λ guess, freeze pitfall, residual readout, reset).

label: Toy model (Model A — rank-one 2×2)
action: Select Model A; resets x and parameters and turns off freeze pitfall.

label: Physical background (expanded)
action: Expand the model details block under the setup drawer for physical context and analytic notes.

label: α (coupling strength)
action: Drag #alpha (approx. −1.5…1.5); numeric field syncs; A(x) and spectrum update live.

label: λ guess (residual probe)
action: Drag #lambda (−1…4); changes displayed r(x, λ) without changing A(x).

label: Pitfall: freeze A at current x (unchecked)
action: Check #freeze to freeze A(x₀), show frozen heatmap/spectrum, and highlight the pitfall.

label: Pitfall: freeze A (checked)
action: Shows inline ⚠ badge and frozen-spectrum column; reminds that linear EVP ≠ NEPv.

label: Relative & absolute residual
action: Read-only metrics; color hints for low/high residual; Reset all restores defaults.

label: Vector compass (||x|| = 1)
action: Drag the blue handle on the unit circle; out-of-circle drags project back with a toast.

label: Heatmap & instantaneous spectrum
action: A(x) heatmap and eigenvalue bars; extra column when freeze pitfall is on.

label: Polar residual plot r(θ)
action: Residual on the unit circle; red marker at θ = 0; updates with parameters.

label: Iteration lab
action: Mode selector, Play, Step, Reset far, Reset to reference; convergence summary below.

label: Eigenvalue pick mode
action: Choose max / min / closest eigenvalue for the fixed-point map.

label: Play
action: Auto-iterate from the PRD reference initial guess (up to 200 steps).

label: Step
action: One fixed-point step; disabled after non-convergence limit.

label: Reset (far)
action: Jump to a deliberately poor initial vector to demonstrate sensitivity.

label: Reset to reference
action: Restore baseline x and k = 0; clears non-convergence warning.

label: Toy model (Model B — diagonal 3×3)
action: Switch to Model B; exposes β₁–β₃ sliders and x₃ control.

label: β₁
action: Adjust #beta1 (diagonal scaling); eigenvalues track diagonal entries.

label: β₂
action: Adjust #beta2 (diagonal scaling); eigenvalues track diagonal entries.

label: β₃
action: Adjust #beta3 (diagonal scaling); eigenvalues track diagonal entries.

label: x₃ (unit sphere)
action: Set third component; works with compass x₁, x₂ under ||x|| = 1.

label: AI Math Tutor
action: Status chips, preset questions, and compose row; rule-based answers grounded in current r, λ, α, freeze, and iteration state.

label: Preset questions
action: One-click prompts (e.g. why not converging, explain freeze pitfall).

label: Pitfalls & FAQ
action: Horizontal layout: main pitfall card (freeze A) and FAQ grid; Try pitfall jumps to lab with freeze on.

label: References (collapsed)
action: Click summary to expand bibliography and teaching notes.

label: References (expanded)
action: Numbered citation list and intro paragraph.

label: Footer disclaimer
action: Read-only teaching-demo disclaimer.

label: x₁ / x₂ numeric fields (mobile)
action: Shown at viewport ≤ 375px; edits normalize x to the unit sphere.

label: Mobile lab (375px)
action: Touch-friendly compass, stacked observe zone, drawer setup controls.
